subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker of truth! Thy letter was received. Thou hast asked me for a written history as well as a record of the prophecies concerning the Bab and Baha’u’llah
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حق مکتوب رسید از من خواهش نگارش تاریخ نموده بودی و همچنین نبواتیکه در
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Baha'u'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
